support.footerPrefix: Got any trouble or have recommendations? Mail us at
support.hint: Please include your Shopify store URL (e.g. your-store.myshopify.com) and a screenshot or steps to reproduce so we can help faster.

reviewPrompt.title: Enjoying {{appName}}?
reviewPrompt.body: If {{appName}} has saved you time, a short rating on the Shopify App Store goes a long way — it helps other store owners find it and tells me what to keep improving. Less than a minute, no pressure.
